explanation:
**Personal finance and investment** use universal mathematical principles (compound interest, time value of money, risk-return optimization). This calculator applies industry-standard formulas.

## How it's calculated

Freelance hourly rate by experience and specialty.

This calculator applies the formula using your input values, checking typical ranges and alerting you to unreasonable values.

## Typical benchmarks by time horizon

| Time Horizon | S&P 500 | 10-Year Bonds | Cash |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 year | Highly variable | 4-5% | 3-5% |
| 5 years | ~8% avg | ~4% | Inflation rate |
| 10 years | ~9-10% | ~4% | Below inflation |
| 20+ years | ~10% nominal | ~5% | N/A |

## Investment principles

- **Don't panic sell** during market downturns. Emotion is your worst investment advisor.
- **Diversify**: avoid concentrating in one asset, sector, or country.
- **Keep costs low**: expense ratios >1% annually will eat 30% of your 30-year returns.
- **Think long-term**: stocks work over 10+ year horizons, not 1-year trading windows.
- **Rebalance once yearly**: no more, no less.

## Final notes

This is an informational reference only. For critical financial, medical, or legal decisions, consult a qualified professional. Rates are current as of 2026 and reviewed periodically.

faq.q: What's a junior developer's hourly rate?
faq.a: Junior (0-2 years experience): $15-30/hour depending on specialty and client type.

faq.q: How much do mid-level developers charge?
faq.a: Mid-level (2-5 years): $30-60/hour. Specialized roles command higher rates.

faq.q: What can a senior developer charge?
faq.a: Senior (5-10 years): $50-100/hour depending on demand and skill depth.
Principal+ (10+ years): $80-150+/hour. High demand, deep expertise commands premium rates.

faq.q: Which tech specialties pay the most?
faq.a: Data Science, Machine Learning, and DevOps typically pay 10-20% more than general frontend development.

faq.q: Does your timezone affect freelance rates?
faq.a: Significantly. US working hours command premium rates. LATAM competes with India—US availability is valuable.

faq.q: Which freelance platform should I use?
faq.a: Upwork takes 10-20% commission; Toptal uses stricter vetting and offers higher rates. Direct clients are best if available.

faq.q: How often should I increase my rate?
faq.a: Every 1-2 years as you gain experience. Increase more frequently if you're fully booked.

sources.name: NIST — National Institute of Standards and Technology
